examples: He got up and walked to the washstand in the corner and stood there, waiting.
A mirror hung on a nail above the washstand.
I remembered the books on Henrys washstand and asked her if she would read me a story.
And then he dipped a horsehair toothbrush in a yellow box of bicarbonate of soda and assaulted his grimace in the spotted mirror hanging over the washstand, amusing himself by rhyming: Gerardus M.
